parameters.query:
SELECT
  o.order_id,
  o.order_date,
  o.buyer_name,
  o.buyer_street,
  o.buyer_city,
  o.buyer_zip,
  o.buyer_country,
  o.items_json,
  o.subtotal,
  o.shipping_cost,
  o.total,
  o.currency,
  o.invoice_number,
  o.tracking_number,
  o.carrier
FROM orders
WHERE order_id = '{{$json.body.order_id}}'
LIMIT 1;
